items.name: agent-skill
items.title: Changelog — The remocn agent skill
items.description: remocn demo composition "Changelog — The remocn agent skill" — installs the full Remotion composition. Generated with AI from the prompt in demos/agent-skill/prompt.md.
items.docs:
Register the composition in your Remotion Root:

  import { AgentSkillDemo } from "@/demos/agent-skill";
  <Composition id="agent-skill" component={AgentSkillDemo} durationInFrames={300} fps={30} width={1280} height={720} />

Requires Tailwind v4 wired into Remotion (@remotion/tailwind-v4).
Render locally: npx remotion render agent-skill out/agent-skill.mp4 --gl=angle
